SessionStart.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Company Pipeline Active: 10-stage sequential workflow. Non-negotiable rules: (1) Stages are sequential, (2) PRD+SRD paired, (3) Tech decisions lock at Stage 3, (4) P0/P1 are release blockers, (5) User decides P2/P3, (6) No trim-to-pass, (7) Progress Sync >20% triggers CTO→CPO. Defect severity: P0=crash/data-loss/security, P1=core-feature-broken, P2=minor/cosmetic, P3=polish. Use /company-pipeline for full reference, /company-personnel for roster, @agent-name for subagents."}}'

SubagentStart.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"Subagent activated. Remember: you are a specialist in the company pipeline. Follow your stage-specific gate criteria. P0/P1 defects are non-negotiable release blockers. Present P2/P3 defects for user decision. Never use trim-to-pass as remediation."}}'

SubagentStop.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStop","additionalContext":"Subagent completed. Verify: (1) All gate criteria for this stage are satisfied, (2) Defect classification is complete (P0-P3), (3) P0/P1 defects have remediation plans, (4) P2/P3 defects are presented for user decision, (5) No trim-to-pass anti-pattern was used. If any gate criterion is unmet, do not advance to the next stage."}}'

Stop.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"Session ending. Pipeline reminder: ensure all artifacts produced in this session are properly documented and gate criteria are recorded. PRD+SRD must travel together. Technology decisions from Stage 3 are locked."}}'
